docket_entries.description: SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF APR-08-2010 - JUDGMENT.
PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF SERVED MAR-01-2010, COURT CERTIFIED MAIL RETURNED SERVED AS TO DEFENDANT PANG, KOON CHUNG
SERVICE OF COMPLAINT BY CERTIFIED MAIL FILED BY PLAINTIFF XU, MU YING AS TO DEFENDANT PANG, KOON CHUNG

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF XU, MU YING RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT PANG, KOON CHUNG $3,975.00 PRINCIPAL, $85.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $4,060.00, THE JUDGMENT REPRESENTS RECOVERY OF $3475.00 FOR THE VALUE OF PLAINTIFF'S CAR, AND $500.00 GENERAL DAMAGES FOR BODILY INJURY. STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS PLAINTIFF'S AND DEFENDANT'S EXHIBITS RECEIVED
ACKNOWLEDGMENT OF SATISFACTION OF JUDGMENT, FULLY SATISFIED, AS TO DEFENDANT PANG, KOON CHUNG
AUTO ACCIDENT CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $7,500.00 FILED BY XU, MU YING AS TO DEFENDANT PANG, KOON CHUNG ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR APR-08-2010 AT 01:30 PM IN DEPT 506

SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF APR-08-2010 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF APR-08-2010 BY PAUL SLAVIT. APPEARANCE BY PLAINTIFF AND DEFENDANT. EDMUND LUI INTERPRETS ENGLISH/CANTONESE - CANTONESE/ENGLISH ON DEFENDANTS BEHALF. PLAINTIFF AND DEFENDANT EXHIBITS RETAINED. CLERK: S. VANTREE. NOT REPORTED. (506)
EXHIBITS FROM EXHIBIT REPORT DATED JUL-01-2010 ORDERED DESTROYED
